summary: Renamed the assembly file asm/melee/pl/pl_0371.s to asm/melee/pl/plstale.s and updated obj_files.mk so the build uses the new object path. The diff was a 100% similarity rename with no code changes, making this a pure file-naming cleanup for the player/pl assembly area.
what_changed: Renamed asm/melee/pl/pl_0371.s to asm/melee/pl/plstale.s with 100% similarity, indicating no assembly content changed.
Updated obj_files.mk under TEXT_O_FILES from $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/pl/pl_0371.s.o to $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/pl/plstale.s.o.
Kept the renamed file in the same ordering location between player.c.o and pltrick.s.o.
smart_moves: Performed the rename as a minimal isolated PR, reducing review risk and making the build-list update easy to verify.
Updated obj_files.mk in the same change as the file rename, preventing stale build references to the old pl_0371.s path.
Used a more semantic player-module filename, plstale, rather than leaving the file under an address-like placeholder name.
decomp_lessons: When renaming an asm file, update obj_files.mk to match the new $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/... .s.o path or the build will still reference the old file.
Pure file renames can be valuable decomp maintenance when replacing anonymous numeric filenames with inferred subsystem names.
A 100% similarity rename is a good way to preserve history and signal that matching/codegen was not affected.
naming_conventions: Replace anonymous pl_#### player assembly filenames with semantic lowercase module names when the module purpose is known.
The chosen name uses the existing compact pl-prefixed style seen nearby in obj_files.mk, such as pltrick, plbonus, and plbonuslib.
The new file name is plstale.s, implying this player module was identified as stale-move or stale-related logic, though no PR body or comments explain the evidence.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No matching or assembly-content tactic was present beyond preserving the assembly file contents exactly during the rename.
Build ordering in TEXT_O_FILES was preserved while changing only the object filename.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that decompile or touch asm/melee/pl/plstale.s.
Search for references to plstale in source headers or player stale-move logic to confirm the naming basis.
Look for other pl_#### assembly files that were later renamed to semantic pl-prefixed module names.
